--- Thread (7 messages, 2018-05-21) ---
[2018-05-21 20:09] kaelii: Well I guess I can story time about Gourdo click. My starting point for the unit was limited to: "Cost to buy, :Blue: :Blue: :Blue: something. Click is likely something steelforgy, spending some :Blue: and :Drone: , makes Wild Drone, maybe other stuff", which leaves a fair bit of space.
The immediate obvious drawback to forging wild drones was that they will often just be defensive tempo of roughly a wall but not actual defense so you'd still have to buy your own defense this turn anyway.
[2018-05-21 20:14] supergreyman (Greyman): What's the stat for Gourdo?
[2018-05-21 20:15] kaelii: 14BBBGGG, 8 health, 3 attack per turn, 4BBDD click make wild and shredder was what I submitted.
[2018-05-21 20:16] kaelii: 1BBDD make wild+steel splitter feels like it's probably just a worse steelforge most of the time.
[2018-05-21 20:16] kaelii: Because you can't make as many steelsplitters from your drones
[2018-05-21 20:17] kaelii: And as a 1 supply unit you couldn't really convert your drones to attackers very fast.
[2018-05-21 20:20] kaelii: On the other hand if your opponent click wild+shredder you could be getting 7 defensive tempo next turn for 4BBDD versus plexo x2 4GGDD for 8 for sure defense this turn. Making the click much cheaper could make it too good defensively as beating plexo is pretty extreme.

--- Thread (27 messages, 2018-05-21) ---
[2018-05-21 20:46] kaelii: Well instead lets make a horribly balanced unit for the new challenge!
Can-Aerie: (3 :Gold: :Red: :Blue: , supply 10 ) :Health: 1
:Lifespan:  2
Start of turn effect: Construct a Bi-Naerie
:Click: :Red: , Gain :Attack: , Reduce the :Exhaust: of all your Bi-Naerie by 1, Sacrifice this.

Bi-Naerie. :Health: 1
Start of turn: Gain :Attack:, :Exhaust: 2
[2018-05-21 20:48] swapgo: This is a lot to take in
[2018-05-21 20:50] swapgo: It sounds way less efficient than a Tarsier
[2018-05-21 20:50] swapgo: It takes 2 turns to even produce 1 attack, even if it can threaten it earlier
[2018-05-21 20:50] kaelii: Yeah probably too much tech attached.
[2018-05-21 20:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): um, that is a weird ability
[2018-05-21 20:51] kaelii: Well it just makes all your Bi-Naeries fire next turn.
[2018-05-21 20:52] kaelii: Which makes it waaaay better on like, Can#4-5-6
[2018-05-21 20:52] swapgo: I think the ability is nice but again, you lose races vs literaly Tarsiers
[2018-05-21 20:53] kaelii: Fair point. Probably too much tech involved.
[2018-05-21 20:55] kaelii: Should probably should be RR or RB or possibly even a single R.
[2018-05-21 20:55] darkeisbein: that unit is pretty weird
[2018-05-21 20:55] kaelii: If it is RB how spooky is Can-Aerie a turn plus click at end of lifespan?
[2018-05-21 20:57] darkeisbein: so if you click this every turn binary attacks every turn right?
[2018-05-21 20:57] darkeisbein: so basically as long as you click one binary is a tarsier
[2018-05-21 20:57] darkeisbein: and you have 0 1 3 5 7 ... binarys
[2018-05-21 20:58] darkeisbein: add 1 damage from the canary click
[2018-05-21 20:58] darkeisbein: which seems pretty scary
[2018-05-21 20:58] kaelii: Well you wouldn't click with 0 out you'd wait for them to be on last lifespan.
[2018-05-21 20:59] darkeisbein: oh I missed the sac on the click
[2018-05-21 20:59] darkeisbein: yeah I guess then it is 0 1 4 6 8 ...
[2018-05-21 21:03] darkeisbein: like comparing this to 2 tarsiers a turn those give 0 2 4 6 8
[2018-05-21 21:04] darkeisbein: and this costs ~1.33 gold less
[2018-05-21 21:05] darkeisbein: but is arguably less flexible? since you really want to keep the train going
[2018-05-21 21:05] kaelii: Maybe it is better to not be a lifespan but a weird stamina unit with Binary made on purchase and click. I donno.
[2018-05-21 21:06] darkeisbein: I think the lack of flexibilty ultimatley hurts the design
[2018-05-21 21:06] darkeisbein: like it just removes so many interesting choices from the game when you have to really buy a canary click a canary each turn
